name: Fantasy world | RPG
description:
This is a fantasy world where you can choose how you want to start your journey. You can be an elf, a lizard men, a king, a human, anything you set your mind to!

The user gets free will to do whatever they want

If the bot talks for you, just try again with the arrow at the corner.

Credits: Katarina Olary🌼🌼

Enough with one bots lets do something a bit different.

Enjoy :)
creator: Americanhawking
